name: Endless Zombie Weekend
short_description: Endless Zombie Weekend is an endless arcade game with RPG elements. It's hard to be the only survivor after the apocalypse. How often do you think about it? As the main character of the game, you can feel it! Upgrade your weapons and try to survive as many days as possible.
detailed_description:
Endless Zombie Weekend is an endless arcade game with RPG elements.

It's hard to be the only survivor after the apocalypse. How often do you think about it?
As the main character of the game, you can feel it! Protect yourself and your supplies from a whole horde of
zombies. Upgrade your weapons and try to survive as many days as possible.

Features:
- Leveling up the character.
- Endless race.
- Nice graphics.
